name: BlackCEO
mission: Help Black creators and entrepreneurs build durable wealth-generating businesses without burning out, by replacing busywork with an AI-run zero-human company.
_comment: This is the schema v2.0 template. Real company-config.json is written by build-workforce.py to ~/clawd/zero-human-company/<slug>/company-config.json. The persona scoring engine reads mission, owner_values, company_kpis, and dept_kpis from this file. Empty arrays cause Layer 1-4 to fall back to a 0.6 neutral score (and log a warning). After Wave 3, Layers 1-4 will be evaluated by DeepSeek V4 Pro via Ollama Cloud (fallback: Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite via OpenRouter).
_comment_personas: FDN-1 (F3.1): default_persona_id is the PER-CLIENT override for the guaranteed no-naked-task fallback — persona-selector-v2.py._fallback_persona() resolves company-config.default_persona_id BEFORE the pinned DEFAULT_PERSONA_FALLBACK ('blackceo-house-voice') constant, so a client may pin their own default. governance_persona_id is the per-client override for the oversight pointer attached to mechanical / no_persona_required tasks (resolved before the pinned GOVERNANCE_PERSONA_FALLBACK 'covey-7-habits'). Both must be canonical persona ids present in persona-categories.json. Leave a value as-is to keep the shipped default; both fields are optional — omitting a field falls through to the pinned constant.
